original_leave_doc.note: Document number of the original leave being returned (e.g. ARL-260121-02)

leave_type.note: Must match the leave type of the original leave doc

period_start.note: Start date of the leave being returned

period_end.note: End date of the leave being returned (same as start for single-day)

requested_days_hours.note: Original amount requested in the leave form (days / hours)

return_days_hours.note: Amount actually being returned. Full day: '1 / 0'; 1 hour: '0 / 1'

description.note: Reason for returning the leave (e.g. came back to work, hospitalization ended early)

inference_rules.note: return_label = '1day' if return_days==1, '1hour' if return_hours==1, etc.

inference_rules.description: Leave type inferred from original leave doc
inference_rules.note: Look up original leave document to confirm leave_type

return_type_distribution.note: Nearly even split; partial-hour returns are slightly more common
